title: Lizelle Rheeder Physiotherapy
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Lizelle Rheeder Physiotherapy was established in 2016 by Lizelle Rheeder (physiotherapist and owner) after the need for home visits in George was identified.

The practice has grown over the past nine years and now has a total of six physiotherapists.


> The practice forms part of the multi-disciplinary team at Groenkloof Sub-Acute Hospital and is now based at Groenkloof, where we see our patients.


Services are also provided to residents in frail care facilities and retirement villages (specifically but not limited to Blue Mountain, Groenkloof, Kraaibosch and Welgelegen), as well as home visits throughout George.

A brand-new offering at the practice is aquatic physiotherapy at the Groenkloof Wellness and Aquatic Centre.

We feel honoured to have been nominated for Best of George. We strive to treat every patient to the best of our abilities and being nominated brings a sense of accomplishment.

We would like to thank our patients for their continued support as we would not be here if it were not for them.

Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/

Lizelle also thanks every member of her team for their loyalty and hard work - it's the teamwork that makes the dream work!

Follow us on Facebook.

The Lizelle Rheeder Physiotherapy team.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
